message:
test(engine): runtime lanes, execution semantics, and capability analysis enrichment

wasm_runtime_lane.rs (+370 lines):
  Bounded queue push/reject/clear tests, WasmSignalKind serde roundtrips,
  lane lifecycle management and deterministic signal ordering.

semantic_twin.rs (+358 lines):
  Twin state machine lifecycle tests, semantic equivalence validation,
  divergence detection, and deterministic replay verification.

semantic_transport_ledger.rs (+218 lines):
  Transport ledger determinism tests, entry linking, and serde roundtrips
  for ledger events and transport receipts.

execution_cell.rs (+118 lines):
  Cell boundary tests, resource limit enforcement, and lifecycle transitions.

constrained_ambient_benchmark_lane.rs (+365 lines):
  Ambient benchmark constraint validation, lane scheduling determinism,
  and performance budget enforcement tests.

counterfactual_evaluator.rs (+325 lines):
  Counterfactual evaluation logic, what-if scenario construction, and
  deterministic outcome comparison tests.

runtime_kernel_lane_charter.rs (+262 lines):
  Lane charter lifecycle, kernel assignment, and resource allocation tests.

static_authority_analyzer.rs (+200 lines):
  Static analysis of authority grants, capability propagation, and
  least-privilege verification tests.

shadow_ablation_engine.rs (+252 lines):
  Ablation diagnostics, capability tightening experiments, and shadow
  execution determinism validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
